---
title: "response_distribution"
author: "sunny yu"
date: "2026-04-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
```



### DATA PREPROCESSING
## pre-process model response to show the image number for each option chosen

```{r cars}
## maps predicted label back to the image number and update the df


library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(readr)

process_task_predictions <- function(task_name) {
  allowed_tasks <- c(
    "egma-math",
    "matrix-reasoning",
    "mental-rotation",
    "theory-of-mind",
    "trog",
    "vocab"
  )
  
  if (!task_name %in% allowed_tasks) {
    stop("task_name must be one of: ", paste(allowed_tasks, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  task_prefix <- gsub("-", "_", task_name)
  simulated_df_name <- paste0(task_prefix, "_simulated")
  option_key_df_name <- paste0(task_prefix, "_option_key")
  
  if (!exists(simulated_df_name, envir = .GlobalEnv)) {
    stop("Object not found: ", simulated_df_name)
  }
  if (!exists(option_key_df_name, envir = .GlobalEnv)) {
    stop("Object not found: ", option_key_df_name)
  }
  
  simulated_df <- get(simulated_df_name, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  option_key_df <- get(option_key_df_name, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  
  option_orders <- fromJSON(
    "/Users/sunnyyu/Desktop/research/levante/data/option_orders_default.json",
    simplifyVector = FALSE
  )
  
  task_trials <- option_orders$tasks[[task_name]]$trials
  
  option_lookup <- map_dfr(task_trials, function(trial) {
    tibble(
      item_uid = trial$item_uid,
      label = map_chr(trial$option_order, "label"),
      option = map_chr(trial$option_order, "option")
    )
  })
  
  # special case: vocab item_uid mismatch between JSON and option key
if (task_name == "vocab") {
  simulated_df <- simulated_df %>%
    mutate(item_uid = sub("^vocab__", "vocab_word_", item_uid))
  
  option_lookup <- option_lookup %>%
    mutate(item_uid = sub("^vocab__", "vocab_word_", item_uid))
}
  
  simulated_df <- simulated_df %>%
    mutate(
      item_uid = as.character(item_uid),
      predicted_label = as.character(predicted_label)
    )
  
  option_key_df <- option_key_df %>%
    mutate(
      item_uid = as.character(item_uid),
      across(starts_with("image"), as.character)
    )
  
  processed_df <- simulated_df %>%
    left_join(
      option_lookup,
      by = c("item_uid", "predicted_label" = "label")
    ) %>%
    rename(predicted_option = option) %>%
    left_join(option_key_df, by = "item_uid")
  
  # special case: mental-rotation has only image1-image3
  if (task_name == "mental-rotation") {
    processed_df <- processed_df %>%
      mutate(
        matched_image = case_when(
          predicted_option == image1 ~ "image1",
          predicted_option == image2 ~ "image2",
          predicted_option == image3 ~ "image3",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      )
  } else {
    processed_df <- processed_df %>%
      mutate(
        matched_image = case_when(
          predicted_option == image1 ~ "image1",
          predicted_option == image2 ~ "image2",
          predicted_option == image3 ~ "image3",
          predicted_option == image4 ~ "image4",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      )
  }
  
  processed_df %>%
    select(any_of(c(
      "item_uid", "predicted_label", "predicted_option",
      "image1", "image2", "image3", "image4", "matched_image"
    ))) %>%
    print(n = 20)
  
  output_file <- paste0(task_name, "_processed.csv")
  write_csv(processed_df, output_file)
  
  message("Saved processed file to: ", output_file)
  
  processed_df
}

```

```{r}
process_task_predictions("vocab")
```






# process the processed_df above into a distribution df (same format as the human distribution)
```{r}

make_item_distribution <- function(processed_df, output_file = "distribution.csv") {
  
  # detect which image columns are present in matched_image
  possible_images <- c("image1", "image2", "image3", "image4")
  
  distribution_df <- processed_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(matched_image)) %>%
    
    # count occurrences
    count(item_uid, matched_image) %>%
    
    # reshape wide
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = matched_image,
      values_from = n,
      values_fill = 0
    )
  
  # add any missing image columns as 0
  for (img in possible_images) {
    if (!img %in% names(distribution_df)) {
      distribution_df[[img]] <- 0
    }
  }
  
  # normalize rows to sum to 1
  distribution_df <- distribution_df %>%
    mutate(
      image1 = coalesce(image1, 0),
      image2 = coalesce(image2, 0),
      image3 = coalesce(image3, 0),
      image4 = coalesce(image4, 0)
    ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      total = sum(c_across(image1:image4)),
      image1 = ifelse(total > 0, image1 / total, 0),
      image2 = ifelse(total > 0, image2 / total, 0),
      image3 = ifelse(total > 0, image3 / total, 0),
      image4 = ifelse(total > 0, image4 / total, 0)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(item_uid, image1, image2, image3, image4)
  
  # save
  write_csv(distribution_df, output_file)
  message("Saved distribution file to: ", output_file)
  
  return(distribution_df)
}


```


```{r}
egma_math_distribution <- make_item_distribution(
  egma_math_processed,
  output_file = "egma-math_distribution.csv"
)

matrix_reasoning_distribution <- make_item_distribution(
  matrix_reasoning_processed,
  output_file = "matrix-reasoning_distribution.csv"
)


tom_distribution <- make_item_distribution(
  theory_of_mind_processed,
  output_file = "theory-of-mind_distribution.csv"
)

trog_distribution <- make_item_distribution(
  trog_processed,
  output_file = "trog_distribution.csv"
)

vocab_distribution <- make_item_distribution(
  vocab_processed,
  output_file = "vocab_distribution.csv"
)


```

### distribution analysis 
## get KL divergence


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}

# KL divergence for two probability vectors
kl_divergence <- function(p, q, epsilon = 1e-12) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  q <- as.numeric(q)
  
  # add epsilon for numerical stability
  p <- p + epsilon
  q <- q + epsilon
  
  # renormalize
  p <- p / sum(p)
  q <- q / sum(q)
  
  sum(p * log(p / q))
}

# main function
get_kl_by_item <- function(human_df, model_df, epsilon = 1e-12) {
  
  prob_cols <- c("image1", "image2", "image3", "image4")
  
  # keep only needed columns from model df
  model_small <- model_df %>%
    select(item_uid, all_of(prob_cols))
  
  # join model distribution onto every human row by item_uid
  joined_df <- human_df %>%
    left_join(
      model_small,
      by = "item_uid",
      suffix = c("_human", "_model")
    )
  
  # compute KL(human || model) for each human row
  kl_df <- joined_df %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      kl_divergence = kl_divergence(
        p = c_across(all_of(paste0(prob_cols, "_human"))),
        q = c_across(all_of(paste0(prob_cols, "_model"))),
        epsilon = epsilon
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  return(kl_df)
}
```



```{r}
kl_results <- get_kl_by_item(
  human_df = egma_math_proportions_by_ability,
  model_df = egma_math_distribution
)
kl_results
```
